events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment complete. The documented sequence (nitrogen purge during brazing → cores removed before evacuation → gauge at far port → deep vacuum to 320 microns → isolate/decay-test hold below 500 microns for 15 min → charge) follows correct trade order with no sequence violations. Wrote `pass` / `low risk` decision with rationale to `/app/answer.json`, noting the one minor gap (no documented standing nitrogen pressure test) as a traceability note rather than a defect.
